strategy: Team gauntlet (24k with escalating absorbs). Hit with Life or Balance (+40%); avoid Ice (80%), Fire (70%), and Death (60%).
Don't cast ward/shield spells — every ward makes him Steal Ward and counter with Brimstone Revenant for 1,500. Survive on resist and heals instead.
He gets a 1,500 Frozen Armor on round 1, a 3,000 absorb after two minions die, and a 6,000 absorb when the last minion dies — plan a hit big enough to break the current absorb.
Time the last minion's death and your burst so you punch through the 6,000 absorb in one hit rather than feeding it chip damage.
Funnel blades and Feints to one hitter and overshoot the absorb.
cheatNotes: He shields himself with a 1,500-absorb Frozen Armor on round 1 — overshoot it.
When two of his minions die he gains a 3,000 absorb.
When his last minion dies he gains a 6,000 absorb — line up a hit big enough to break it.
Beguiling can trigger the final 6,000 absorb early.
Any ward/shield you cast makes him Steal Ward and hit back with Brimstone Revenant for 1,500 — skip shields.
